name: Heavenly Dessert Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan lightly.
2. Sprinkle the graham cracker crumbs over the greased bottom.
3. Dust off any excess crumbs.
4. Place the cottage cheese in a blender container.
5. Cover and blend on high speed until smooth.
6. In an electric mixer bowl, combine the blended cottage cheese, Nufchatel cheese, sugar, and flour.
7. Mix at medium speed until well combined.
8. Add eggs one at a time, mixing thoroughly after each addition.
9. Blend in milk and almond extract.
10. Pour the mixture into the prepared pan.
11. Bake at 325 degrees F for 45 to 50 minutes, or until the center is almost set (the center will be soft but firm when cooled).
12. Remove from the oven and let cool completely before removing the rim of the pan.
13. Chill in the refrigerator.
14. Top with fresh strawberries or blueberries if desired.
